steps.title: Use the known point
steps.content:
The model gives $f(x)=\frac{1}{7}(x-a)+433$, and the function value is $433$ when $x=3{,}331$. Substitute that point.
$$
433=\frac{1}{7}(3{,}331-a)+433
$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content: Subtract $433$ and then multiply by $7$. $$ 0=\frac{1}{7}(3{,}331-a) $$ $$ 0=3{,}331-a $$ $$ a=3{,}331 $$ The answer is 3331.
